voice.disclosure: Narration is AI-generated using OpenAI text-to-speech.

shots.title: The collision
shots.narration: Parallel coding agents are fast. But a workstation still shares product work, ports, browsers, simulators, and finite compute. Two agents can be individually correct and still collide.

shots.title: Two-key clearance
shots.narration: Gatehold is local clearance control for coding agents. Before controlled work starts, it asks two questions: does this agent own the workstream, and can this machine carry the task right now?

shots.title: One owner
shots.narration: Agent zero seven receives a time-bound heavy lease for authentication work, with an isolated runtime lane and named port. Ownership, capacity, heartbeat, and expiry are explicit before the task begins.

shots.title: Semantic hold
shots.narration: Another agent describes overlapping session-renewal work with different words. G P T five point six may add a conservative semantic hold, but it has deliberately limited authority. It cannot grant clearance, override deterministic policy, reorder the queue, or run a command.

shots.title: Machine-aware waiting
shots.narration: Clearance is also machine-aware. When the host is under pressure, independent heavy work waits in a deterministic first-in, first-out queue. Abandoned requests expire, so one vanished agent cannot block the machine forever.

shots.title: Owned cleanup
shots.narration: Finishing also means restoring the workstation. Gatehold cleans the proven process group, dev server, browser profile, and port opened by a managed task. Exit, interruption, lost heartbeat, and daemon recovery share one idempotent path. Gatehold shuts down only the exact simulator it booted and confirmed; human simulators stay untouched.

shots.title: Codex through the gate
shots.narration: Codex built and tested this repository, and it is also a controlled client. The Gatehold skill requires claim before edit, governed execution for heavy work, heartbeat during long tasks, and release on completion. There is no bypass-on-error path.

shots.title: Honest replay and privacy
shots.narration: The public dashboard is a labeled synthetic replay. Live local mode reads only the loopback daemon. Deterministic policy needs no API key, and optional model calls use bounded, sanitized metadata with storage disabled.

shots.title: One clearance layer
shots.narration: Gatehold gives cooperative agents a simple rule: one owner, one isolated runtime lane, owned cleanup at the finish, and no heavy start without clearance. One machine. Many agents. One clearance layer.
